items.title: S&P 500, Nasdaq Post Weekly Losses as Tech Sell-Off Continues
items.content: S&P 500 and Nasdaq ended the week lower as the tech sell-off persisted. Dow eked out modest gains but overall market sentiment remained cautious amid rising AI infrastructure cost concerns.

items.title: Global Tech Stocks Selloff: AI Infrastructure Costs Bite; Chip Stocks Sink
items.content: Chip stocks sold off globally on Friday. Intel -3%, Sandisk -10%, Arm -4%, Marvell -5%, Micron -5%. SMIC tumbled nearly 7%. Only Apple bucked the trend +3%. Megacaps all down at least 8% in June.

items.title: Hang Seng Index Drops 1.76% to 22,671 as AI Sell-Off Hits One-Year Low
items.content: Hang Seng Index closed Friday at 22,671, down 1.76%, driven by AI-related selloff pushing the index to its lowest level in a year.

items.title: HSI Down Nearly 10% YTD; Hang Seng Tech Index Down Over 20%
items.content: Mid-year review shows HSI down nearly 10% YTD as of June 25. Hang Seng Tech Index declined over 20%, lagging global benchmarks. AI hardware and deep tech remain dominant themes. Zhipu AI surged over 19-fold.

items.title: US PCE Price Index Annual Change Rises to 4.10% in May from 3.80%
items.content: PCE inflation accelerated to 4.10% in May, up from 3.80% in April. Fed revised its inflation projections at June meeting, forecasting PCE at 3.6% and core PCE at 3.3% for 2026. Fed opened door to further rate hikes.

items.title: 2026 Iran War Ceasefire and Strait of Hormuz Crisis Update
items.content: US-Iran ceasefire agreed April 7-8. On May 24, US and Iran nearing broader peace agreement. Trump stated MOU close to finalization, Strait of Hormuz could soon reopen. June 19: Trump announced renewed Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire. Strait of Hormuz crisis remains active.

items.title: China's Technology IPO Market Rebounds on AI and Semiconductor Push
items.content: Tech companies raised combined $3.1B through stock market listings in China Jan-Jun 2026, driven by AI and semiconductor push amid US-China tech rivalry.

items.title: Hang Seng Rose 0.36%; CSI 300 Up 0.48%
items.content: Hong Kong's Hang Seng rose 0.36% to 23,420.4 on June 24. Mainland CSI 300 up 0.48% to 4,943.02. Brief bounce amid broader downtrend.

items.title: Schwab Market Update: 63% of S&P 500 Stocks Above 50-Day MA, Yield Drop Offers Hope
items.content: Recent yield drop presents hope for industrials and discretionary sectors. 63% of S&P 500 stocks trade above their 50-day moving average. Oil price volatility remains a concern.

items.title: SSE Composite Holds Near 4,120 as AI Stocks Rally, Micron Earnings Lift China Tech
items.content: Shanghai Composite closed at ~4,120 on June 25, up 0.23%. AI stocks rallied driven by Micron's strong earnings, briefly lifting China tech sentiment.

items.title: Micron Tops Q3 Earnings Estimates, Offers Better-Than-Expected Outlook
items.content: Micron beat analyst expectations on top and bottom lines for Q3 FY2026, surpassing estimates for memory demand. However, stock subsequently fell more than 5% as broader tech sell-off overwhelmed positive news.

items.title: Stocks Fall as Tech Sell-Off Expands to Memory and Chips; SpaceX Rebounds
items.content: Tech sell-off expanded to memory and chip sectors on June 23. SpaceX rebounded from record low. Dow held up better than Nasdaq.
